nasb.text: And he led Him up and showed Him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time.

esv.text: And the devil took him up and showed him all the kingdoms of the world in a moment of time,

cnv.text: 魔鬼引他上到高處，霎時間把天下萬國指給他看，

ccb.text: 魔鬼又带祂上到高处，顷刻间把天下万国展示给祂看，

csbs.text: 魔鬼就把耶稣领上高处，在一瞬间给他看天下万国，
